calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Vicki Gross.

Richard Wallace, Esq. appeared for plaintiff 5th Street Associates, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Ben Ron, a surveyor for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
Paul DeMartini, property manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant All Persons Unknown, Claiming Any Legal or Equitable Right, Title, Estate, Lien, or Interest in the Property Described in the Complaint Adverse to Plaintiff's Title, or any Cloud Upon Plaintiff's Title Thereto.
Default was entered against defendants on December 7, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff 5th Street, Associates, LLC, a California limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendants All Persons Unknown, Claiming Any Legal or Equitable Right, Title, Estate, Lien, or Interest in the Property Described in the Complaint Adverse to Plaintiff's Title, or any Cloud Upon Plaintiff's Title Thereto as follows:

Title to the property described in Exhibit A of the judgment is quieted in plaintiff 5th Street Associates, LLC, a California limited liability company as of November 10,1995 against the entire world. Plaintiff 5th Stret Associates, LLC, a California limited liability company is the sole owner of the property in fee simple absolute, and no other person has any right, title or interest in the property except as shown in the Public Records.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2010 Continued To Mar-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
